page_title: Hondolab Yours: Your Custom AI Model & Digital Assets
intro_paragraph_1: The wave of AI generation has arrived, but it brings a fundamental dilemma: Are you building 'assets' or accumulating 'liabilities'?
intro_paragraph_2: When your team uploads precious original characters, creative manuscripts, and brand designs to general models like ChatGPT and Midjourney, you're using your most valuable data to train a 'public brain' that doesn't belong to you and isn't under your control. Once it enters these general large models, your original content becomes someone else's training data. This isn't collaboration—it's a one-way loss of digital assets.
